docket_entries.description: REMARK: RECEIVED MAIL BY POST OFFICE ON JAN 29, 2026. SMALL CLAIMS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO ALYSIA TRAN RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-02-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT ACTIVSPACE LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-16-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-16-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ALYSIA TRAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ACTIVSPACE LLC IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $525.00 FILED BY TRAN, ALYSIA AS TO DEFENDANT ACTIVSPACE LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-16-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JAIME KIRBY FILED BY DEFENDANT ACTIVSPACE LLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRAN, ALYSIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ACTIVSPACE LLC $470.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $500.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-16-2026 - JUDGMENT.
